name: Expand This
text:
Expand the following text into a fuller, more detailed version. Add supporting details, examples, and context while preserving the original meaning and style:

{selection}

name: Vary Sentence Rhythm
text:
Rewrite the following text to vary the sentence rhythm — mix short punchy sentences with longer ones to create a more engaging read. Keep all the same ideas:

{selection}

name: Make More Vivid
text:
Rewrite the following text to be more vivid and engaging, adding sensory details and stronger word choices without changing the core meaning:

{selection}

name: Write a Title
text:
Suggest five possible titles for the following text. Make each title concise (under 12 words) and descriptive:

{selection}

name: Generate Outline
text:
Create a structured outline for the following text, organizing the key points into a logical hierarchy with headings and subpoints:

{selection}

name: Suggest Supporting Evidence
text:
For the following claim or argument, suggest the types of evidence, studies, or sources that would best support it. Be specific about what kind of evidence to look for:

{selection}

name: Plain Language
text:
Rewrite the following text in plain language, using simple vocabulary and short sentences so it is accessible to a general audience. Avoid jargon:

{selection}
